command: uv run python scripts/train_dense_decoder.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d3/corpus.jsonl --corpus-record results/D4_hf_corpus_materialization.json  --device rocm --seq-len 128 --hidden-dim 528 --layers 3 --heads 8 --batch-size 2 --steps 10000 --validation-batches 8 --gradient-accumulation-steps 1 --max-file-bytes 256000 --mixed-precision fp32 --output-dir artifacts/adapter_decoder_10m_hf_d4_identity_probe --attention-mask-mode additive_causal --progress-interval 500 --checkpoint-interval 1000 --architecture-variant adapter --adapter-dim 64 --output results/T7c_rocm_adapter_decoder_10m_hf_d4_identity_probe.json
notes: Initial configurable dense decoder training smoke from random initialization on the filtered local repository corpus. This validates the pipeline only; it is not the required 10-50M parameter or 50M-token run.
